overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city. The journey transitions from narrow commercial streets through heavy fog on elevated highways to open city boulevards, showcasing the game's atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy rain and dense fog reducing visibility throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with neon advertisements

events.description: steering around a palm tree obstacle in the middle of the road
approaching the Delamain checkpoint gates at the end of the street

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow neon-lit commercial street, steering around a central palm tree obstacle

entered.detail: large vertical neon advertisement with red and white text on the right building
illuminated beverage advertisement with red neon lighting
overhead covering spanning the narrow street between buildings
dark modern building wall with minimal lighting on the left side
palm tree or large bush growing in the middle of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a narrow, rain-soaked commercial street lined with bright neon billboards advertising various products. The street is partially covered by overhead structures, and the driver steers around a palm tree growing in the middle of the road before approaching a checkpoint.

events.description: passing through the Delamain checkpoint gates into a narrow corridor
entering a dense fog bank that significantly reduces visibility

agents.ego_description: driving through the Delamain checkpoint into a narrow fog-filled corridor between towering skyscrapers

entered.detail: checkpoint structure with glowing Delamain signage on both sides
illuminated corporate sign for Delamain on the left gate
illuminated corporate sign for Delamain on the right gate
tall dark glass and steel building wall on the left
tall dark glass and steel building wall on the right

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes through the Delamain checkpoint gates into a narrow urban canyon between towering skyscrapers. Visibility rapidly deteriorates as dense fog engulfs the corridor, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere with only the building facades visible through the mist.

events.description: emerging from the narrow street onto an elevated highway
passing underneath a large concrete overpass structure
approaching and passing other vehicles barely visible through the dense fog

agents.ego_description: driving on an elevated highway through extremely dense fog with minimal visibility, navigating under overpasses and following distant tail lights

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with glowing red tail lights barely visible through the dense fog

entered.detail: wet asphalt road surface of the elevated highway with rain droplets visible
metal safety barrier on the left side of the highway
metal safety barrier on the right side of the highway
large concrete bridge structure passing overhead with support beams

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto an elevated highway engulfed in extremely dense fog, reducing visibility to near zero. The vehicle navigates the wet road surface, passing under massive concrete overpass structures while following the faint red glow of tail lights from vehicles ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway toll plaza with corporate signage

events.description: exiting the dense fog bank as visibility gradually improves
entering the toll booth checkpoint structure with red neon lighting
passing through the toll booth gates onto surface streets

agents.ego_description: descending from the elevated highway and passing through a toll booth checkpoint with prominent corporate signage

entered.detail: checkpoint structure with multiple lanes and overhead canopy
large corporate advertisement sign for Biotechnica
digital news ticker display showing breaking news headlines
horizontal red neon light strips illuminating the toll plaza

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the dense fog and descends from the elevated highway into a toll plaza checkpoint. The area is illuminated by red neon lights and features large corporate billboards for Biotechnica and breaking news displays. The car passes through the toll gates, transitioning from the highway to surface streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban boulevard with palm trees and traffic

events.description: exiting the toll booth onto open city streets with palm trees visible
stopping at a red traffic light behind other vehicles

agents.ego_description: driving on open city streets lined with palm trees, approaching and stopping at a red traffic light behind a black SUV

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped at the red traffic light ahead

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the boulevard
low-rise commercial buildings with illuminated windows
overhead traffic signal showing red light
yellow and white painted lines on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the toll plaza onto an open urban boulevard lined with palm trees and commercial buildings. The fog has lifted slightly, revealing more of the cityscape. The car approaches an intersection and stops at a red traffic light behind a black SUV, with other vehicles visible on the cross street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked futuristic city that transitions from narrow neon streets through a claustrophobic fog into an open urban boulevard. It begins by navigating a commercial street lined with bright billboards and overhead structures, steering around a central palm tree before passing through a checkpoint. As the vehicle enters a narrow urban canyon between towering skyscrapers, visibility rapidly deteriorates into a dense, suffocating fog that persists onto an elevated highway, where the camera follows the faint red glow of distant taillights under massive concrete overpasses. The scene then shifts as the vehicle descends from the highway into a red-lit toll plaza featuring corporate Biotechnica billboards, moving through the gates to leave the mist behind. Finally, the environment opens up onto a wide boulevard lined with palm trees and commercial buildings, where the car comes to a halt at a red traffic light behind a black SUV.
